subject: Appointment Confirmed: Dr. Whitaker, Dec 17 9:00 AM
body_preview: Your COPD follow-up and pulmonary function test with Dr. Whitaker is confirmed for Dec 17 at 9:00 AM.

subject: Reminder: Fasting Bloodwork Before Jan 5 Visit
body_preview: Please complete fasting bloodwork prior to your Jan 5 gout follow-up with Dr. Beckett. No food after midnight.

subject: Appointment Confirmed: Dr. Pierce, Oct 15 10:00 AM
body_preview: Your annual vision exam with Dr. Pierce is confirmed for Oct 15 at 10:00 AM. Please bring your current glasses.

subject: Appointment Confirmed: Dr. Moss Cleaning, Feb 18
body_preview: Your six-month dental cleaning with Dr. Moss is confirmed for Feb 18 at 9:00 AM. Reply to reschedule.

subject: Appointment Confirmed: Annual Physical, Sep 21 2027
body_preview: Your annual physical with Dr. Ahn is scheduled for Sep 21 at 9:00 AM. Fasting labs will be ordered beforehand.

subject: Portal Message: Lab Results Available
body_preview: Your uric acid panel results are now available in the patient portal. Dr. Beckett has reviewed them.

subject: Reschedule Request Received
body_preview: We received your request to move your October visit. We have you confirmed for October 18 at 9:00 AM.

subject: Prescription Refill Approved: Spiriva
body_preview: Dr. Ahn approved your Spiriva refill. It has been sent to your CVS pharmacy in Annapolis.

subject: Reminder: Vision Exam Copay
body_preview: A copay may apply at your Oct 15 exam. Please have your Medicare and GEHA cards available at check-in.

subject: Telehealth Visit Confirmed: Dr. Ahn, Oct 24
body_preview: Your blood pressure review video visit with Dr. Ahn is confirmed for October 24 at 2:00 PM.

subject: PFT Appointment Scheduled
body_preview: Your pulmonary function test is booked the same morning as your Dec 17 visit. Please avoid albuterol for 6 hours prior.

subject: Statement Available: Chesapeake Lung
body_preview: Your statement for the March visit is available in the portal. Balance after insurance is due within 30 days.

subject: Appointment Confirmed: Dr. Beckett, May 4
body_preview: Your gout follow-up with Dr. Beckett is confirmed for May 4 at 10:00 AM. Continue allopurinol as directed.

subject: Fasting Bloodwork Booked: Quest Diagnostics
body_preview: Your fasting draw is booked for October 16 at 8:15 AM. Bring the lab order from Dr. Ahn.

subject: Records Request Completed
body_preview: The records you requested have been released to Chesapeake Lung & Sleep Center as authorized.

subject: Statement Available: Annapolis Rheumatology
body_preview: Your statement for the May visit is ready. Your Medigap plan covered the balance in full.

subject: Hygiene Reminder: Cleaning Due
body_preview: Our records show you are due for a cleaning. Reply or use the portal to confirm your Feb 18 slot.

subject: Optical Order Ready for Pickup
body_preview: Your new progressive lenses are ready for pickup at our Annapolis optical shop during business hours.

subject: Prescription Refill Approved: Allopurinol
body_preview: Dr. Beckett approved your allopurinol 300mg refill. It was sent to your Walgreens in Annapolis.

subject: Portal Message: Visit Summary Posted
body_preview: Your visit summary from the March appointment with Dr. Whitaker is posted in the patient portal.

subject: Statement Available: Annapolis Family Dental
body_preview: Your statement for the February cleaning is available. A small balance remains after insurance.

subject: Reschedule Confirmed: Telehealth Moved
body_preview: Per your request we moved your April check-in to April 8 at 2:00 PM via video. No action needed.

subject: Portal message: PFT results ready
body_preview: Your pulmonary function test results are available in the patient portal. Dr. Whitaker has added a note.

subject: Prescription refill approved: Spiriva
body_preview: Your Spiriva (tiotropium) refill has been sent to your pharmacy. Three refills remain.

subject: Lab results posted: uric acid
body_preview: Your uric acid panel from the recent fasting draw is posted. Dr. Beckett will review at your visit.

subject: Allopurinol refill confirmation
body_preview: Your allopurinol 300mg refill has been processed. Continue taking with the evening routine.

subject: Annual physical — pre-visit questionnaire
body_preview: Please complete the pre-visit health questionnaire before your annual physical with Dr. Ahn.

subject: Lisinopril renewal
body_preview: Your lisinopril 10mg prescription has been renewed for one year.

subject: Vision exam results and new prescription
body_preview: Your progressive-lens prescription has been updated. Your optician has the details.

subject: Post-cleaning summary
body_preview: Your cleaning is complete. No new concerns. Next visit recommended in six months.

subject: Explanation of Benefits available
body_preview: An EOB for a recent claim is available. This is not a bill. Your Medigap covered the balance.

subject: Part B premium notice
body_preview: Your quarterly Part B premium notice is available in your account. Autopay is on file.

subject: Please sign: Homeowners policy renewal
body_preview: State Farm has sent your homeowners renewal for signature. Review and sign at your convenience.

body_preview: Your library volunteer agreement has been completed and stored. A copy is attached.
